stateJson.sprintGoal: 完成全部 3 个 ATU（认证+角色管理+文档CRUD），使所有测试通过

atus.title: Implement POST /login (routes_auth.py)
atus.description: Implement the login route in routes_auth.py. POST /login accepts {username, password}, verifies credentials using middleware.hash_password(), returns JWT token containing user_id, tenant_id, and exp. Errors: 400 if missing fields, 401 if invalid credentials. Response format: {status: ok, data: {token: str}}.

atus.title: Implement role management routes (routes_role.py)
atus.description: Implement all role management routes in routes_role.py: POST /roles (create role, requires role.manage), GET /roles (list tenant roles, requires role.manage), PUT /roles/<id>/permissions (replace permissions + update parent, cycle detection), POST /users/<id>/roles (assign role, same-tenant check), DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id> (remove role, idempotent). Must detect inheritance chain cycles.

atus.title: Implement document routes (routes_document.py)
atus.description: Implement all document CRUD routes in routes_document.py: GET /documents (doc.read, own tenant only), GET /documents/<id> (doc.read + same tenant), POST /documents (doc.write), PUT /documents/<id> (doc.write + owner OR doc.write.any), DELETE /documents/<id> (doc.delete). Proper tenant isolation and 404 for cross-tenant access.

history.event: Tester: 12/12 document + multi-tenant + inheritance tests passed
